title: giliastrum ludens
intro: Giliastrum ludens, also known as Desert Moon or Mooncup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and it has been used in herbal preparations to treat colds and flu. In herbal medicine, Giliastrum ludens is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions.
